content:
1. Generates monthly article summaries (title/author/date/wordcount/category) plus aggregates for a given year+month, with optional category filter. Exists as a quick demo that now has perf problems.

2. N+1 author lookups; in-memory category filter; Dec year rollover; no input validation; Report fields are mutated after construction.

3. Batching authors and pushing category filter into SQL (explicitly called out as still open).

4. Bad year/month, missing authors, DB failure, empty categories list, timezone-naive datetimes, concurrent data changes between queries.
